title: GB/P-014+P-015+P-016: planner upgrade - bootstrap ownership, Unknowns section (U1), blindspot interview (U3)
description: Owned files: .claude/agents/orchestration-planner.md AND .harness/plan.md ONLY. (a) P-014/F1 - add a planner checklist rule: enumerate shared bootstrap files (test package markers like tests/__init__.py, fixtures dirs, conftest-like infra) as explicitly owned artifacts of a specific task in every decomposition. (b) P-015/U1 - the planner MUST include an '## Unknowns' section per epic in plan.md with the 4 quadrants (known knowns / known unknowns / unknown knowns / unknown unknowns); every BLOCKING known-unknown must become either a spike task in the DAG or a numbered question for the human, resolved BEFORE publishing the DAG. (c) P-016/U3 - blindspot-interview step: before finalizing the DAG, the planner writes explicit candidate assumptions (unknown-knowns) for the coordinator to confirm with the human; confirmed assumptions get recorded in plan.md. Add ONE compact template section to .harness/plan.md demonstrating the Unknowns format (clearly marked '## TEMPLATE'). Do NOT change any other planner rule (roles, no-source-edits, DAG discipline stay verbatim). Acceptance: the three rules present with concrete actionable wording; template renders in plan.md; diff shows additions only (no removals of existing planner contract); a fresh reader would know exactly what to produce.

notes.note: plan: add F1 bootstrap-ownership decomposition rule + U1 Unknowns protocol step + U3 blindspot-interview protocol step to orchestration-planner.md (additions only), and a worked ## TEMPLATE Unknowns (4 quadrants) block to plan.md (spike-task micro-example + human-confirmation micro-example)

EXPECTED: additions-only diff to both owned files implementing F1 (bootstrap-ownership decomposition rule), U1 (Unknowns section protocol step + template), U3 (blindspot interview protocol step). ACTUAL: git diff shows 66 insertions(+), 0 deletions(-) across both files (verified via 'git diff --stat' and grep for '^-' lines excluding the '---' file-header markers -> 0 real removals). Task description's own P-numbering ((a) P-014/F1, (b) P-015/U1, (c) P-016/U3) is offset by one from audit_gen3.md's canonical numbering (P-013/F1, P-014/U1, P-015/U3, where P-016 = separate ORCHESTRATION.md item routed to T-040/GE) -- content implemented matches the F1/U1/U3 substance in both docs; flagging the label mismatch as a deviation, not a scope change. Self-check: (1) three rules present with concrete wording incl. one worked micro-example each (spike-task conversion for a BLOCKING known-unknown; human-confirmation for an unknown-known) -- PASS; (2) template renders (balanced code fences, ## TEMPLATE marker present at plan.md:124, grep -c known-unknown=3) -- PASS; (3) diff additions-only, no existing planner rule text removed (roles/no-source-edits/DAG-discipline sections untouched) -- PASS.

HANDOFF -> verifier: Replay: 1) git diff --stat .claude/agents/orchestration-planner.md .harness/plan.md -> expect '27 +++' / '39 +++' with 0 deletions (2 files, 66 insertions(+)). 2) git diff .claude/agents/orchestration-planner.md .harness/plan.md | grep '^-' | grep -v '^---' -> expect EMPTY (no real removals, only the standard diff file-header '---' lines matched by the raw grep). 3) grep -n 'Bootstrap/infra ownership (F1)\|Blindspot interview (U3)\|Unknowns section (U1)' .claude/agents/orchestration-planner.md -> 3 hits (new steps 5,6 in Protocol + new bullet in Decomposition rules). 4) grep -n '^## TEMPLATE' .harness/plan.md -> plan.md:124. 5) grep -c known-unknown .harness/plan.md -> 3. 6) Read both files end-to-end to confirm original Protocol steps 1-4, Decomposition rules (parallel-by-default, verifier join, task size, fan-out, engine routing, high-uncertainty/tournament), and Hard constraints (no source edits, no LLM APIs, thinking tags) are byte-identical to pre-change (only new content appended within/after existing lists). NOTE for verifier: task's own description numbers the proposals (a) P-014/F1 (b) P-015/U1 (c) P-016/U3, one off from audit_gen3.md's canonical P-013/F1, P-014/U1, P-015/U3 (P-016 there = separate ORCHESTRATION.md item, routed elsewhere as T-040/GE). I implemented per the CONTENT specified in T-037's own description (F1 bootstrap rule + U1 Unknowns quadrants + U3 blindspot interview), which is unambiguous regardless of the label offset -- please confirm this reading is acceptable or flag for renumbering.

VERIFIED (independent replay + static read, cognitive-diversity: producer used grep/diff-stat, I did full-diff semantic read + fresh-planner actionability simulation). DIFF DISCIPLINE: git diff --stat = 27+ / 39+ = 66 insertions, 0 deletions; 'git diff | grep ^- | grep -v ^---' EMPTY; Protocol steps 1-4, all pre-existing Decomposition rules, and Hard constraints byte-identical (no reword). CONTENT vs audit_gen3.md: F1(audit P-013 L253-256) = planner Decomposition bullet L53-60, enumerate every shared bootstrap/infra file -> assign EACH to exactly ONE task or dedicated bootstrap task in depends_on, 'No infra file unowned across parallel siblings' -> makes unowned infra impossible, MATCH + mdtoc precedent cite. U1(audit P-014 L270-275) = Protocol step 6 L29-38, 4 quadrants named, classify BLOCKING/NON-BLOCKING, every BLOCKING closed pre-publish via spike-task-in-depends_on OR recorded human answer, 'MUST NOT be published' gate, MATCH + ## TEMPLATE block. U3(audit P-015 L288-291) = Protocol step 5 L20-28, 3-5 concrete assumptions to human (AskUserQuestion or blocking numbered note), recorded in plan.md Unknowns, MATCH. ID offset (registry P-014/15/16 = audit P-013/14/15) confirmed cosmetic; substance identical. ACTIONABILITY: fresh-planner sim PASS -- template carries a real spike-task wiring (T-0XX-spike + depends_on:[T-0XX-spike] for tests/ writers) and a real confirmed-assumption line (idempotent re-run CONFIRMED). TEMPLATE: renders (2 pre-existing triple-fences, balanced; template uses blockquote+bullets, no unclosed fence), 4 quadrant names agree between files (known/unknown x known/unknown, same order), mdtoc tests/__init__.py precedent cited in both. SEQUENCING: steps 5-6 appended after 3-4 but each explicitly 'run BEFORE step 3 (publishing tasks)' + hard 'MUST NOT be published' gate + template 'BEFORE its DAG is published' -> interview-after-publish reading foreclosed; append-with-back-ref is the additions-only-compatible way to insert a pre-publish gate (renumbering would violate diff discipline). Minor ergonomic caveat noted, not blocking. DISCIPLINE: transcript shows worker-2 acquire+release on both owned files under T-037; no orphaned lease; handoff not self-done (was in review); git diff on the two owned files is additions-only, other modified files (blackboard.py/blackboard.json/state.json/cli.py/test_cli.py) attributable to live siblings T-036/T-038.
